recalls.Description: Meijer has announced a recall of Konwin desktop heaters, identified by model number BHN2133. These heaters feature a white plastic casing with a black fan and grill covers, measuring approximately 12 inches in height and 10 inches in width. The brand name 'Konwin' along with the model number is displayed on a label located at the bottom of the unit.
recalls.Title: Meijer Issues Recall for Konwin Desktop Heaters Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Meijer at 800-927-8699, use the contact form available at Web Form, or visit https://help.meijer.com/csp?id=m_kb_recall or https://www.meijer.com/ and navigate to 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page for further details.

Injuries.Name: The firm received eight reports of fans burning and melting. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Meijer locations across Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, Illinois, Wisconsin, and Kentucky from September 2024 through January 2025, priced between $25 and $40.

Importers.Name: Meijer Distribution Inc., of Grand Rapids, Michigan

Hazards.Name: Risk of overheating and fire due to fan failure

Remedies.Name: Return the heater to any Meijer store for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Meijer recalls Konwin desktop heaters due to potential fire and burn hazards. Learn how to return for a full refund.
